title: Agentic Platform: Data Engineering Intern
description:
Perpendo AI is looking for a Data Engineering Intern to help build and maintain the data infrastructure that
underpins our AI-native Insurance platform. You will work directly on SOV ingestion pipelines, field-level
ontology validation, null handling strategies, and the data governance framework that ensures every risk record
is traceable from intake to output.
Key Responsibilities
• Build and maintain ETL pipelines for ingesting Statement of Values (SOV) and COPE data from diverse
client formats (Excel, CSV, Accord XML)
• Implement field-level validation rules across 57+ data fields spanning 9 ontological categories
• Develop null-handling, imputation, and transformation logic aligned with the Perpendo AI Field Ontology
and Data Dictionary
• Integrate with Verisk SQL, geocoding APIs, and external regulatory data sources
• Maintain data quality dashboards and anomaly detection monitors
• Collaborate with AI agents (AGT-01 Intake, AGT-02 Normalization) to ensure clean data hand-offs
Required Qualifications
• Pursuing BS/MS in Computer Science, Data Science, Statistics, or related field
• Strong Python skills; proficiency with Pandas, Polars, or PySpark for data manipulation
• Working knowledge of SQL and relational database design
• Attention to detail and comfort working with messy, real-world tabular data
• Understanding of data quality principles: validation, deduplication, schema enforcement
Preferred / Bonus Skills
• Experience with dbt, Apache Airflow, or similar data pipeline tools
• Familiarity with insurance data
• Exposure to data governance frameworks, data lineage, or audit trail design
• Knowledge of Excel/XLSB parsing (openpyxl, xlrd) and PDF extraction
